title: Shader +
description: Everything you need to run shaders
body:
Modpack to help beginners with shaders use or to Install everything you need to play with shaders in one click 

It adds various optimization mods to be ready to play with shaders
and the best of all,It adds a shader library inside the game

EXCLUSIVE for complementary shaders there is a euphoria patches mod to add more customization to Complementary shaders
